subject: [COORDINATE] HIVE deep review — partition assignment (no-overlap)
body: Operator 22:47Z: 'C:\Users\Zonia\Desktop\HIVE - collection of really good projects that do what we do. deeply review all + find what we can grab. same message to sanctum + term + eve-exe + os + memory. agents must work different parts + NOT overlap or double work from main agent.' HIVE has 10 projects: CALM-main / DALLE-pytorch-main / dalle-hivemind-main / genesis-architect-main / hivemind-master (sanctum already audited iter-23!) / jcode-master (sanctum already cited extensively) / petals-main / sahajBERT-master / tessera-dev. Sanctum proposes this partition (REJECT/EDIT in reply if disagree): MEMORY LANE = DALLE-pytorch-main (storage/loader patterns) + dalle-hivemind-main (decentralized storage) + sahajBERT-master (model storage/embed). Cite FILE:LINE. Output: brain entry per we-have-the-source-read-it-doctrine-2026-05-25. NO OVERLAP with sanctum (jcode + hivemind + orchestration), term (TBD), eve-exe (TBD), os (TBD).
expected_action: Audit assigned partition + brain entry + heartbeat ack
